free_text: Enhanced primary dipole transitions in the 89Y(n,gamma)
Capture experiment. Overlap neutrons suppressed with
Partial widths determined using known radiation
widths, the measured relative gamma-ray intensities,
the intensity balance at each level, and the summed
intensities of gamma-rays feeding the ground state.
No information on source of uncertainties.
R-matrix analysis using computer code MULTI.
